form.formComment: Second-up. First start ran last of 9 at Tamworth Cge Mdn-Sw on August 15 over 1200m, 36 len behind Dartbrook carrying 59kg at $41. Went for a spell before returning ran last of 10 at Grafton Ctry Mdn on April 7 over 1180m, 11 len behind Archie Maximus carrying 59kg at $81. Doesn't make any appeal.

form.formComment: Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at Tuncurry Mdn on April 4 over 1205m, in the wet; 0.9 len behind Dancingontherosso with 57kg at $31. The race before that second last of 9 at Port Macquarie Mdn on March 28 over 1008m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Posh Annie carrying 55.5kg at $16. Wasn?t too far off the mark last time. Won't be far away with a repeat of that latest performance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out rounding the home turn.
Shifted in and bumped another runner on jumping.
Shifted in behind runners from its barrier.
From a wide barrier, directed behind runners during the early stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 7 at Kilcoy Cg&E Mdn on April 11 over 1200m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Lucky Artie with 55.5kg at $9. The start before that set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Kilcoy Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.9 len behind Sir Memphis with 58.5kg at $7. Hard to beat on his best form.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after seven months ran last of 11 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Transporter with 59.5kg at $12. Previously second-up 5th of 10 at Mildura Mdn-Sw on August 9 over 1409m, 3.5 len behind Calm Down Sheriff with 59.5kg at $3.90. Strips fitter and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of eight months. Finished off last preparation when last of 13 at Ipswich Mdn-Sw August 8 over 1350m, soft track; 16 len behind Miss Linny with 58.5kg at $2.05. Previously first up; fifth of 9 at Eagle Farm Mdn-Sw July 23 over 1000m, soft track; 9 len behind Yoyo Yeezy carrying 58kg at $9. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 10 at this track Super Mdn November 9 over 1100m, soft track; 3 len behind Bullant carrying 55.5kg at $20. Previously first up; fifth of 9 at this track Mdn October 25 over 1100m, 2 len behind Tourtel carrying 56.5kg at $7. Will take great benefit from this run.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. The start before that second last of 9 at Taree Cl1-Sw on February 13 over 1614m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Dollars with 55kg at $5.50. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 4th of 12 at Tamworth Super Mdn on April 10 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Hinto with 58.5kg at $4.20. The run before that led but faded 3rd of 10 at this track Mdn on March 29 over 1100m, 5 len behind Diva Rouge with 59kg at $4.20. Assisted by the rails draw so should run well again.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, raced on the pace before fading ran last of 10 at Scone Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1200m, on a slow track; 17 len behind Oakfield Alaska carrying 58.5kg at $26. Runner-up in a Scone trial over 900m on April 1. Gone back to the trials and looks better for it.

form.formComment: Gelding by North Pacific facing the starter for the first time. Was runner-up in a trial at Scone on April 1 over 900m. Promising type who should be primed for a big debut.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, sat on the pace before fading second last of 10 at this track Super Mdn on March 13 over 1100m, slow going 5 len behind Rainsitpours with 58.5kg at $7.50. Second-up sat on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 10 at this track Mdn on March 29 over 1100m, 6 len behind Diva Rouge with 59kg at $8. Open to plenty of improvement and might surprise.
